rationale: The proposed change concerns the property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §254.201 governs annual reporting of unexpended political contributions by former officeholders and unsuccessful candidates. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: A person covered by this section shall file an annual report for each year in which the person retains unexpended contributions.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses campaign finance reporting; the proposed change addresses property tax exemption levels. No statutory or constitutional interaction identified.
